about.title: About UniWise
about.text1: UniWise is a school assistant chatbot that helps students find answers quickly.
about.text2: Use it for FAQs like requirements, schedules, office contacts, school updates, and location assistance.

updates.label: Update
updates.title: School Services
updates.text: Access enrollment details, school notices, campus guidance, and important service information.

updates.label: Schedule
updates.title: Campus Hours
updates.text: For faster transactions, visit during official office hours and prepare the department you need.

updates.label: Reminder
updates.title: Before You Visit
updates.text: Bring complete documents, valid details, and confirm the office or concern before going to school.

posts.title: Suspension of Classes
posts.body: Please be reminded that the classes on July 13, 2026 is suspended due to Holiday.
posts.extra: There will be no office available that day.
posts.caption: Please be reminded that the classes on July 13, 2026 is suspended due to Holiday.
posts.author: admin

posts.title: Congratulations!
posts.body:
𝗖𝗔𝗠𝗣𝗘𝗥𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗜𝗗𝗘! ✨
𝐂𝐨𝐧𝐠𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐮𝐥𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬 𝐭𝐨 𝐒𝐇𝐒𝐁𝐄𝐒 𝐒𝐢𝐧𝐚𝐠𝐭𝐚𝐥𝐚 𝐃𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐞𝐫𝐬 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐝𝐨𝐦𝐢𝐧𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐞𝐞𝐭 𝐝𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐞 𝐜𝐨𝐦𝐩𝐞𝐭𝐢𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧! 👏🕺

Your breathtaking performance, creativity, and dedication through every practice and hard work had earned you these awards that truly inspires many.

╰ 𝗕𝗲𝘀𝘁 𝗶𝗻 𝗖𝗵𝗼𝗿𝗲𝗼𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗽𝗵𝘆 - 𝗛𝗶𝗴𝗵𝘀𝗰𝗵𝗼𝗼𝗹 𝗗𝗶𝘃𝗶𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻
╰ 𝗚𝗿𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗖𝗵𝗮𝗺𝗽𝗶𝗼𝗻 - 𝗛𝗶𝗴𝗵𝘀𝗰𝗵𝗼𝗼𝗹 𝗗𝗶𝘃𝗶𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻

Keep dancing, keep inspiring, and continue reaching greater heights. Congratulations, champions! ✨💃

🎨: Luis Gabrielle Roa
🖋️: Zyerina Alexa Millonte
posts.caption:
𝗖𝗔𝗠𝗣𝗘𝗥𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗜𝗗𝗘! ✨
𝐂𝐨𝐧𝐠𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐮𝐥𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬 𝐭𝐨 𝐒𝐇𝐒𝐁𝐄𝐒 𝐒𝐢𝐧𝐚𝐠𝐭𝐚𝐥𝐚 𝐃𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐞𝐫𝐬 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐝𝐨𝐦𝐢𝐧𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐞𝐞𝐭 𝐝𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐞 𝐜𝐨𝐦𝐩𝐞𝐭𝐢𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧! 👏🕺

Your breathtaking performance, creativity, and dedication through every practice and hard work had earned you these awards that truly inspires many.

╰ 𝗕𝗲𝘀𝘁 𝗶𝗻 𝗖𝗵𝗼𝗿𝗲𝗼𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗽𝗵𝘆 - 𝗛𝗶𝗴𝗵𝘀𝗰𝗵𝗼𝗼𝗹 𝗗𝗶𝘃𝗶𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻
╰ 𝗚𝗿𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗖𝗵𝗮𝗺𝗽𝗶𝗼𝗻 - 𝗛𝗶𝗴𝗵𝘀𝗰𝗵𝗼𝗼𝗹 𝗗𝗶𝘃𝗶𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻

Keep dancing, keep inspiring, and continue reaching greater heights. Congratulations, champions! ✨💃

🎨: Luis Gabrielle Roa
🖋️: Zyerina Alexa Millonte
